title: TheFadeEnd
description: New mobs, items, structures, dimension, biome, sounds
body:
TheFadeEnd is mode 100% gonna like to you. I love TheFadeEnd you love TheFadeEnd we love TheFadeEnd. TheFadeEnd is mode about very dangerous night. Night is not gonna be a safe you need to run and hide but if you a strong one you can fight and get some items you can use it for new blocks.
Have a 283+ elements of something new (triggers, mobs, blocks, dimension, items) you gonna like it 
New mobs: Crazy time, Nothing, Antinull, ErrorData, Trololoxa, Lexa, YOURcHENKO, TestMe, YouAreNotAlone, fake pig, NOTCOW.EXE, Prototype, NOTEVENREAL, and more. new biome the fadebiome is biome made from deepslate and all monsters of all mode gonna spawn in this biome when is night. The biome is full dark with no clounds. 11 new dimension (TheFadeEnd dimension, OLGAHER, IsThatNether?) Fade dimension is full dark dimension and you gonna blind in the dimension and he have a lot a LOT OF monsters. OLGAHER is dimension is full made from dirt and portal is doing with dirt and 2 new structures spawn in this biome. IsThatNether looks like nether but corrupted portal made from blackstone.
(mode can create a one file) not a virus
(Mode cant harm you or your pc)
created with love
